title: BillingWorkflowCollectionAlignmentAnchored
description:
BillingWorkflowCollectionAlignmentAnchored specifies the alignment for collecting the pending line items
into an invoice.

recurring_period.description: The recurring period for the alignment.

anchor.description: A date-time anchor to base the recurring period on.
anchor.title: Anchor time

interval.description: The interval duration in ISO 8601 format.
interval.title: Interval in ISO 8601 duration format
